params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a 2-to-1 input multiplexer that selects between two 32-bit input data lines (a0 and a1) based on a 6-bit selection address (sel_addr). However, when sel_addr is set to 6'b110000, the multiplexer outputs a1; when sel_addr is set to 6'b110001, it outputs a0.
